# Diamond Ecosystem - Comprehensive Summary

**Generated by:** Mistral Vibe CLI Agent  
**Date:** 2026-05-10  
**Version:** 1.0.0  

---

## Executive Summary

The Diamond Ecosystem is a multi-agent, multi-service infrastructure for GPU VRAM monitoring, orchestration, and automated offloading. It integrates FastAPI gateways, Cloudflare Workers, MCP servers, and Notion databases to provide a comprehensive solution for managing GPU-intensive workloads.

### Core Value Proposition
- **Real-time GPU VRAM monitoring** with Ising Hamiltonian calculation
- **Automated offloading** when VRAM saturation exceeds 90%
- **Multi-agent task dispatch** via MCP protocol
- **Notion integration** for soul-capsule persistence
- **Claw propagation** to Slack, Telegram, and other channels

---

## Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                           DIAMOND ECOSYSTEM ARCHITECTURE                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                              MONITORING LAYER                                    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐              │
│  │  GPU (NVIDIA)│───▶│ pynvml/nvidia-ml │───▶│ Diamond Gateway  │              │
│  │  VRAM Usage  │    │     -py         │    │ (FastAPI)        │              │
│  └─────────────┘    └─────────────────┘    └──────┬──────────┘              │
│                                                    │                          │
│  Ising Hamiltonian: H(s) = (VRAM_Used / VRAM_Total) * 10          │
│   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│   • H(s) > 8.5 → OFFLOAD (VRAM > 90%)                              │
│   • H(s) ≤ 8.5 → CONTINUE                                           │
│                                                    │                          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                              ORCHESTRATION LAYER                                  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐              │
│  │ OFFLOAD     │    │ Notion Bridge    │    │ Notion DB        │              │
│  │ Payload     │───▶│ (Cloudflare)     │───▶│ (Soul-Capsule)   │              │
│  └─────────────┘    └─────────────────┘    └─────────────────┘              │
│          │                                                                      │
│          ▼                                                                      │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐              │
│  │                      NOTION PAGE CREATED                        │              │
│  │  Properties: Session ID, VRAM Used/Total, Hamiltonian, Status     │              │
│  │  Context: Code block with session buffer                       │              │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘              │
│                                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                              MCP / DISPATCH LAYER                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐              │
│  │ HANDOFF     │    │ gc-mcp           │    │ Tools:           │              │
│  │ .jsonl      │───▶│ (Cloudflare)     │───▶│ • submit_hybrid  │              │
│  │             │    │ MCP 2025-03-26   │    │ • submit_opus    │              │
│  └─────────────┘    └─────────────────┘    │ • submit_opus_   │              │
│                                                │   notion         │              │
│  ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐    │ • offload_to_   │              │
│  │ Daemon      │───▶│ Materializer    │    │   notion        │              │
│  │ (Bash)      │    │ (Node.js)        │    │ • propagate_to_ │              │
│  └─────────────┘    └─────────────────┘    │   claws         │              │
│                                                └─────────────────┘              │
│                                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                              PROPAGATION LAYER                                    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐              │
│  │                     CLAW PROPAGATION                           │              │
│  │  Targets: Slack, Telegram, OpenClaw, KimiClaw, NemoClaw         │              │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘              │
│                                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Component Inventory

### 1. Diamond Gateway

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| **Path** | `/opt/diamond-gateway/` |
| **Type** | FastAPI Application |
| **Language** | Python 3.11+ |
| **Service** | `diamond-gateway.service` (systemd) |
| **Port** | 8000 (localhost only) |
| **User** | www-data |
| **Status** | ✅ Running |

#### Endpoints

| Method | Path | Description | Auth Required |
|--------|------|-------------|---------------|
| GET | `/health` | Health check | ❌ No |
| GET | `/metrics` | GPU VRAM & power metrics | ✅ Yes |
| POST | `/v1/orchestrate` | VRAM orchestration with H(s) | ✅ Yes |

#### Key Features
- **Real-time VRAM monitoring** via pynvml/nvidia-ml-py
- **Ising Hamiltonian calculation**: `H(s) = (VRAM_Used / VRAM_Total) * 10`
- **Offload threshold**: H(s) > 8.5 (90% saturation)
- **Mock VRAM support** for testing
- **Bearer token authentication** (GATEWAY_SECRET)

#### Dependencies
- `fastapi`
- `uvicorn`
- `pynvml` / `nvidia-ml-py`
- `python-multipart`

#### Configuration
```bash
# /etc/default/diamond-gateway
GATEWAY_SECRET=your-secret-key-here
```

#### Service Management
```bash
# Restart after code changes
sudo systemctl restart diamond-gateway

# View logs
sudo journalctl -u diamond-gateway -f

# Check status
systemctl status diamond-gateway
```

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| **Path** | `~/gc-workers/` |
| **Type** | Monorepo |
| **Packages** | gc-mcp, diamondnode-integration |
| **Status** | ✅ Deployed (gc-mcp) |

#### 2.1 GC MCP Server

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| **Path** | `~/gc-workers/gc-mcp/` |
| **Type** | Cloudflare Worker |
| **Language** | TypeScript |
| **MCP Version** | 2025-03-26 |
| **Status** | ✅ Running (3 endpoints) |

##### Endpoints

| URL | Transport | Status |
|-----|-----------|--------|
| `https://api.optimizationinversion.com/mcp` | Streamable HTTP | ⚠️ 404 (needs DNS config) |
| `https://gc-api.genesisconductor.io/mcp` | Streamable HTTP | ⚠️ Needs verification |
| `https://gc-mcp.iholt.workers.dev/mcp` | Streamable HTTP | ✅ Running |

##### MCP Tools

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `submit_hybrid_task` | Dispatch to Codex hybrid workflow |
| `submit_opus_notion_task` | Dispatch to Claude Opus + Notion |
| `submit_opus_task` | Dispatch to Claude Opus |
| `offload_to_notion` | Offload session to Notion soul-capsule |
| `propagate_to_claws` | Propagate to Slack, Telegram, etc. |

##### Discoverability
- `/mcp` - Primary MCP endpoint (Streamable HTTP)
- `/sse` - Legacy SSE transport
- `/messages` - SSE POST receiver
- `/health` - Status & discovery
- `/.well-known/mcp` - MCP server discovery
- `/.well-known/ai-plugin.json` - OpenAI plugin manifest
- `/.well-known/openapi.json` - OpenAPI 3.1 spec
- `/llms.txt` - LLM-readable documentation
- `/robots.txt` - Crawler directives
- `/sitemap.xml` - Sitemap

#### 2.2 Diamondnode Integration

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| **Path** | `~/gc-workers/diamondnode-integration/` |
| **Type** | Local Daemon + Materializer |
| **Language** | Node.js / Bash |
| **Status** | ⚠️ Stopped (needs .env) |

##### Components

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `bin/diamondnode-daemon.sh` | Main daemon loop (5s poll) |
| `lib/materializer.js` | Process HANDOFF.jsonl → run-*.sh |
| `lib/propagator.js` | Propagate to claws |
| `lib/notion-offloader.js` | Offload to Notion |
| `handoffs/inbox/` | HANDOFF.jsonl inbox |
| `handoffs/processed/` | Archived handoffs |
| `handoffs/materialized/` | Generated scripts |
| `handoffs/results/` | Execution logs |

##### Environment Variables
```bash
# /home/diamondnode/gc-workers/.env
GC_MCP_URL=https://gc-mcp.iholt.workers.dev/mcp
GC_MCP_INGRESS_AUTH=your-ingress-token
GC_NOTION_BRIDGE_URL=https://notion-bridge.iholt.workers.dev
GC_NOTION_BRIDGE_AUTH=your-bridge-token
GC_API_KEY=your-api-key
GC_SOUL_CAPSULE_DB_ID=21e416066ef1411084d1bbaf67af79d1
GC_TIMEOUT_MS=30000
NOTION_TOKEN=your-notion-token
CLAW_TARGETS=slack,telegram
SUMMARY_PRIORITY=normal
POLL_INTERVAL=5
```

##### HANDOFF.jsonl Format
```jsonl
{"type":"dispatch","workflow":"hybrid","task_id":"hybrid-1778417409914-vjp8p3meu","payload":{"prompt":"npm publish + stdio wire-up for gc-mcp","tags":["codex","hybrid","T1"]}}
{"type":"dispatch","workflow":"opus_notion","task_id":"opus-notion-1778417433730-ycnl6jl2i","payload":{"prompt":"PR #6 review + merge gate","notion_page_id":"35c98ee3-e91e-8133-b678-c525b5a0b02a"}}
{"type":"dispatch","workflow":"opus","task_id":"opus-1778417450000-abcdefgh","payload":{"prompt":"T4 disambiguation — resolve CRYSTALLINE vs non-CRYSTALLINE branch conflict"}}
```

##### Daemon Workflow
1. Poll `handoffs/inbox/` every 5 seconds
2. For each `.jsonl` file:
   - Run materializer → generates `run-*.sh` scripts
   - Execute all generated scripts
   - Archive to `handoffs/processed/`
3. Optional: Offload snapshots to Notion
4. Optional: Propagate summaries to claws

- **ID**: `21e416066ef1411084d1bbaf67af79d1`
- **Name**: Soul-Capsule (presumed)

#### Properties

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| Session ID | Title | Unique session identifier |
| VRAM Used MiB | Number | VRAM used in MiB |
| VRAM Total MiB | Number | Total VRAM in MiB |
| Hamiltonian | Number | H(s) value |
| Status | Select | "OFFLOAD" |
| Context Blob | Code | Session context buffer |

#### Payload Format
```json
{
  "action": "OFFLOAD",
  "session_id": "test-001",
  "context_buffer": "[CTX] model=llama3 layers=80",
  "hamiltonian": 9.2,
  "vram_used_mib": 9200,
  "vram_total_mib": 10000
}
```

#### Secrets (via Wrangler)
```bash
wrangler secret put NOTION_TOKEN
wrangler secret put GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET
```

## Integration Flow

### Main Flow: GPU Monitoring → Offload

```
1. GPU VRAM fills to >90% capacity
   ↓
2. Diamond Gateway polls VRAM via pynvml
   ↓
3. Gateway calculates: H(s) = (VRAM_Used / VRAM_Total) * 10
   ↓
4. If H(s) > 8.5:
   ├── Returns OFFLOAD response with:
   │   ├── session_id
   │   ├── context_buffer
   │   ├── hamiltonian
   │   ├── vram_used_mib
   │   └── vram_total_mib
   ↓
5. Client POSTs OFFLOAD payload to Notion Bridge
   ↓
6. Notion Bridge validates GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET
   ↓
7. Notion Bridge creates page in soul-capsule database
   ↓
8. Session context persisted in Notion
```

### MCP Dispatch Flow

```
1. HANDOFF.jsonl file placed in inbox/
   ↓
2. diamondnode-daemon detects file
   ↓
3. Materializer processes file → generates run-*.sh scripts
   ↓
4. Daemon executes scripts
   ↓
5. Scripts may call gc-mcp tools:
   ├── submit_hybrid_task → Codex
   ├── submit_opus_task → Claude Opus
   ├── submit_opus_notion_task → Claude Opus + Notion
   ├── offload_to_notion → Notion Bridge
   └── propagate_to_claws → Slack, Telegram, etc.
   ↓
6. Results archived to processed/
```

## Goals & Objectives

### Primary Goals (Achieved ✅)

1. ✅ **Real-time GPU monitoring** - Diamond Gateway monitors VRAM
2. ✅ **Ising Hamiltonian orchestration** - H(s) calculation and threshold logic
3. ✅ **Automated offloading** - OFFLOAD action when H > 8.5
4. ✅ **MCP server deployment** - gc-mcp running on Cloudflare Workers
5. ✅ **Notion integration** - Notion Bridge deployed

### Secondary Goals (In Progress 🟡)

1. 🟡 **Start diamondnode daemon** - Requires .env configuration
2. 🟡 **Process pending handoffs** - sample-handoff.jsonl waiting in inbox
3. 🟡 **Configure all DNS endpoints** - optimizationinversion.com, genesisconductor.io
4. 🟡 **Set up authentication tokens** - GATEWAY_SECRET, NOTION_TOKEN, etc.
5. 🟡 **Deploy Notion Bridge with secrets** - Needs wrangler secret configuration

### Future Goals (Planned 📋)

1. **Multi-GPU support** - Extend beyond single GPU monitoring
2. **Advanced orchestration** - More sophisticated load balancing
3. **Additional MCP tools** - Expand tool set for more workflows
4. **Automated CI/CD** - GitHub Actions for all components
5. **Monitoring dashboard** - Real-time web dashboard
6. **Alerting system** - Proactive notifications on issues

## Quick Start Guide

### 1. Start All Services

```bash
# Diamond Gateway is already running (systemd)
systemctl status diamond-gateway

# Start diamondnode daemon (requires .env)
cd /home/diamondnode/gc-workers
cp config.example.env .env
# Edit .env with your actual secrets
bash diamondnode-integration/bin/diamondnode-daemon.sh
```

### 2. Test the Gateway

```bash
# Get metrics (requires GATEWAY_SECRET)
GATEWAY_SECRET=$(cat /etc/default/diamond-gateway | grep GATEWAY_SECRET | cut -d= -f2)
curl -X GET http://localhost:8000/metrics \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GATEWAY_SECRET"

# Test orchestration with mock VRAM
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/orchestrate \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GATEWAY_SECRET" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "session_id": "test-001",
    "context_buffer": "[CTX] model=llama3 layers=80",
    "mock_vram_used": 9200,
    "mock_vram_total": 10000
  }'
```

### 3. Test MCP Server

```bash
# Check health
curl https://gc-mcp.iholt.workers.dev/health | python3 -m json.tool

# List tools
curl -X POST https://gc-mcp.iholt.workers.dev/mcp \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}'
```

### 4. Deploy Notion Bridge (if needed)

```bash
cd /home/diamondnode/genesis/notion-bridge

# Set secrets first (requires CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN)
wrangler secret put NOTION_TOKEN
wrangler secret put GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET

# Deploy
npx wrangler deploy
```

### 5. Run the Dashboard

```bash
# View ecosystem status
python3 /home/diamondnode/dashboard.py

# Or for colored output
./dashboard.py
```

---

## Security Considerations

### Secrets Management

⚠️ **NEVER** commit the following to version control:
- `NOTION_TOKEN` - Notion integration token
- `GATEWAY_SECRET` - Gateway authentication token
- `GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET` - Notion Bridge authentication
- `GC_API_KEY` - Internal API key
- `GC_NOTION_BRIDGE_AUTH` - Bridge authentication
- `GC_MCP_INGRESS_AUTH` - MCP ingress authentication
- `CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN` - Cloudflare API token

### Recommended Storage

| Secret | Storage Method |
|--------|-----------------|
| GATEWAY_SECRET | /etc/default/diamond-gateway |
| NOTION_TOKEN | wrangler secret |
| GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET | wrangler secret |
| GC_* secrets | /home/diamondnode/gc-workers/.env |
| CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN | Environment variable |

### Authentication Flow

```
┌─────────────┐     ┌─────────────┐
│   Client    │────▶│   Gateway   │
│             │     │             │
└─────────────┘     └──────┬──────┘
                        │
                        ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              Bearer Token Validation               │
│  Authorization: Bearer $GATEWAY_SECRET             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                        │
                        ▼
┌─────────────┐     ┌─────────────┐
│  Notion      │◀────│  Notion      │
│  Bridge      │     │  Bridge      │
│  Client      │     │  Worker      │
└─────────────┘     └─────────────┘
       │
       ▼
┌─────────────┐
│  Notion API │
│  Bearer     │
│  $NOTION_TO │
│    KEN      │
└─────────────┘
```

## Troubleshooting

### Common Issues

#### Issue: Diamond Gateway returns 401
**Cause:** Invalid or missing GATEWAY_SECRET  
**Solution:** Ensure `/etc/default/diamond-gateway` contains `GATEWAY_SECRET=your-key`

#### Issue: gc-mcp returns 404
**Cause:** Custom domain not configured  
**Solution:** Use `https://gc-mcp.iholt.workers.dev/mcp` directly

#### Issue: Notion Bridge returns 401
**Cause:** Missing GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET  
**Solution:** Set secret via `wrangler secret put GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET`

#### Issue: diamondnode-daemon fails to start
**Cause:** Missing .env file or environment variables  
**Solution:** Copy `config.example.env` to `.env` and fill in values

#### Issue: pynvml deprecated warning
**Cause:** Using deprecated pynvml package  
**Solution:** Install nvidia-ml-py: `pip install nvidia-ml-py`

### Debug Commands

```bash
# Check all running services
ps aux | grep -E "(gateway|daemon|uvicorn|node)" | grep -v grep

# Check open ports
ss -tulnp | grep -E "(8000|8080)"

# Test Notion API connectivity
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $NOTION_TOKEN" \
  -H "Notion-Version: 2022-06-28" \
  https://api.notion.com/v1/databases/21e416066ef1411084d1bbaf67af79d1
```

---

## Configuration Reference

### Diamond Gateway Configuration

```python
# /opt/diamond-gateway/gateway.py
GATEWAY_SECRET = os.environ["GATEWAY_SECRET"]  # Required

# Endpoints
GET  /metrics      - GPU metrics (auth required)
GET  /health       - Health check (no auth)
POST /v1/orchestrate - VRAM orchestration (auth required)

# Ising Hamiltonian
H = (vram_used / vram_total) * 10
OFFLOAD_THRESHOLD = 8.5  # 90% saturation
```

### GC MCP Configuration

```typescript
// /home/diamondnode/gc-workers/gc-mcp/src/index.ts
const MCP_PROTOCOL_VERSION = "2025-03-26";
const SERVER_NAME = "gc-mcp";
const SERVER_VERSION = "1.0.0";

// Supported transports
- Streamable HTTP (POST /mcp) - RECOMMENDED
- SSE (GET /sse + POST /messages) - LEGACY
- JSON-RPC (POST /) - LEGACY
```

### Notion Bridge Configuration

```typescript
// /home/diamondnode/genesis/notion-bridge/src/index.ts
interface Env {
  NOTION_TOKEN: string;        // Notion API token
  DATABASE_ID: string;        // Soul-capsule DB ID
  GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET: string; // Auth for incoming requests
}

// Required payload
interface OffloadPayload {
  action: "OFFLOAD";
  session_id: string;
  context_buffer: string;
  hamiltonian: number;
  vram_used_mib: number;
  vram_total_mib: number;
}
```

---

## API Reference

### Diamond Gateway API

#### GET /health
```bash
curl http://localhost:8000/health
# Response: {"status": "ok"}
```

#### GET /metrics
```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $GATEWAY_SECRET" \
  http://localhost:8000/metrics

# Response:
{
  "vram_used_mib": 7500,
  "vram_total_mib": 10000,
  "power_draw_mw": 165000,
  "power_limit_mw": 200000
}
```

#### POST /v1/orchestrate
```bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/orchestrate \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GATEWAY_SECRET" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "session_id": "test-001",
    "context_buffer": "[CTX] model=llama3",
    "mock_vram_used": 9200,
    "mock_vram_total": 10000
  }'

# Response (H > 8.5):
{
  "action": "OFFLOAD",
  "session_id": "test-001",
  "context_buffer": "[CTX] model=llama3",
  "hamiltonian": 9.2,
  "vram_used_mib": 9200,
  "vram_total_mib": 10000
}

# Response (H ≤ 8.5):
{
  "action": "CONTINUE",
  "session_id": "test-001",
  "hamiltonian": 7.5,
  "vram_used_mib": 7500,
  "vram_total_mib": 10000
}
```

### GC MCP API (MCP Protocol)

#### Initialize
```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "initialize"
}

// Response:
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "result": {
    "protocolVersion": "2025-03-26",
    "capabilities": {"tools": {"listChanged": false}, "logging": {}},
    "serverInfo": {"name": "gc-mcp", "version": "1.0.0"}
  }
}
```

#### List Tools
```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/list"
}

// Response includes 5 tools:
// submit_hybrid_task, submit_opus_notion_task, submit_opus_task,
// offload_to_notion, propagate_to_claws
```

#### Call Tool: offload_to_notion
```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "offload_to_notion",
    "arguments": {
      "session_id": "test-001",
      "context_buffer": "[CTX] model=llama3",
      "hamiltonian": 9.2,
      "vram_used_mib": 9200,
      "vram_total_mib": 10000
    }
  }
}
```

## Vibe CLI Enhancements

### New Skills Added

#### 1. Notion Skill (`~/.vibe/skills/notion/SKILL.md`)

**Capabilities:**
- Search Notion workspaces
- Fetch page content
- Create pages and database entries
- Query databases
- Soul-capsule offload integration

**Usage:**
```
# Ask Vibe to research and document something in Notion
"Search Notion for GPU monitoring best practices"
"Create a documentation page in Notion about the Diamond Ecosystem"
"Query the soul-capsule database for recent offloads"
```

#### 2. GitHub Skill (`~/.vibe/skills/github/SKILL.md`)

**Capabilities:**
- Repository management
- Issue tracking and management
- Pull request operations
- Code search and analysis
- Workflow automation
- Artifact handling

**Usage:**
```
# Ask Vibe to analyze code
"Review the Diamond Gateway code for security issues"
"Search for all uses of pynvml in the codebase"
"Create a GitHub issue for the deprecated pynvml warning"
```

### MCP Servers Configured

```toml
[mcp_servers]
  { name = "gc-mcp", transport = "streamable-http", url = "https://api.optimizationinversion.com/mcp" }
  { name = "gc-mcp-gc", transport = "streamable-http", url = "https://gc-api.genesisconductor.io/mcp" }
  { name = "gc-mcp-dev", transport = "streamable-http", url = "https://gc-mcp.iholt.workers.dev/mcp" }
```

---

## Dashboard

A comprehensive status dashboard has been created at `/home/diamondnode/dashboard.py`.

### Features
- Real-time service status checks
- HTTP endpoint health monitoring
- Git repository status
- Handoff queue monitoring
- System information (CPU, memory, GPU)
- Integration flow visualization
- Structural breakdown display

### Usage

```bash
# Run the dashboard
python3 /home/diamondnode/dashboard.py

# Make executable and run
chmod +x /home/diamondnode/dashboard.py
./dashboard.py

# For continuous monitoring (refresh every 30s)
watch -n 30 python3 /home/diamondnode/dashboard.py
```

### Dashboard Output Sections
1. **Ecosystem Overview** - System info, hostname, timestamp
2. **Service Status** - All services and their health
3. **Codebase Status** - Git info for all repositories
4. **Handoffs & Materialization** - Pending and processed handoffs
5. **Artifact Registry** - Cloudflare Workers and local services
6. **Integration Flow** - ASCII diagram of the architecture
7. **Vibe Configuration** - Vibe skills and settings
8. **Structural Breakdown** - Assets, goals, and key metrics

---

## Next Steps

### Immediate Actions (Priority: High)

1. **Configure diamondnode daemon**
   ```bash
   cd /home/diamondnode/gc-workers
   cp config.example.env .env
   # Edit .env with actual secrets
   ```

2. **Start the daemon**
   ```bash
   bash diamondnode-integration/bin/diamondnode-daemon.sh
   # Or as systemd service:
   sudo cp diamondnode-integration/diamondnode-daemon.service /etc/systemd/system/
   sudo systemctl enable diamondnode-daemon
   sudo systemctl start diamondnode-daemon
   ```

3. **Set Cloudflare secrets**
   ```bash
   cd /home/diamondnode/genesis/notion-bridge
   wrangler secret put NOTION_TOKEN
   wrangler secret put GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET
   ```

4. **Configure DNS for gc-mcp**
   - Set up api.optimizationinversion.com → gc-mcp
   - Set up gc-api.genesisconductor.io → gc-mcp

### Short-term Actions (Priority: Medium)

1. **Test end-to-end flow**
   ```bash
   # Trigger mock offload
   curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/orchestrate \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $GATEWAY_SECRET" \
     -d '{"session_id":"e2e-test","context_buffer":"test","mock_vram_used":9200,"mock_vram_total":10000}'
   
   # Forward to Notion Bridge
   curl -X POST https://notion-bridge.iholt.workers.dev \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET" \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d '<paste OFFLOAD response>'
   ```

2. **Process pending handoffs**
   - The sample-handoff.jsonl in inbox/ needs processing
   - Starting the daemon will process it automatically

3. **Set up monitoring**
   - Configure Prometheus or similar for metrics
   - Set up alerts for service failures

### Long-term Actions (Priority: Low)

1. **Implement automated deployments**
   - GitHub Actions for all components
   - CI/CD pipeline for testing and deployment

2. **Enhance security**
   - Token rotation automation
   - Access control policies
   - Audit logging

3. **Improve observability**
   - Real-time dashboard with auto-refresh
   - Centralized logging
   - Metrics collection and visualization

4. **Expand functionality**
   - Add more MCP tools
   - Support additional cloud providers
   - Multi-GPU monitoring

## Appendix

### A. File Locations

```
 Diamond Gateway:
   /opt/diamond-gateway/
   ├── gateway.py              # Main application
   ├── venv/                   # Python virtualenv
   └── (systemd: /etc/systemd/system/diamond-gateway.service)

 GC Workers:
   /home/diamondnode/gc-workers/
   ├── AGENTS.md               # Documentation
   ├── config.example.env      # Configuration template
   ├── gc-mcp/
   │   ├── src/index.ts        # MCP server
   │   ├── package.json
   │   ├── wrangler.toml
   │   └── deploy.sh
   └── diamondnode-integration/
       ├── bin/diamondnode-daemon.sh
       ├── lib/
       │   ├── materializer.js
       │   ├── propagator.js
       │   └── notion-offloader.js
       ├── handoffs/
       │   ├── inbox/
       │   │   └── sample-handoff.jsonl
       │   ├── processed/
       │   └── materialized/
       └── diamondnode-daemon.service

 Notion Bridge:
   /home/diamondnode/genesis/notion-bridge/
   ├── src/index.ts            # Cloudflare Worker
   ├── package.json
   ├── wrangler.toml
   └── deploy.sh

 Vibe Configuration:
   /home/diamondnode/.vibe/
   ├── config.toml            # Vibe configuration
   ├── .env                   # API keys (DO NOT READ)
   └── skills/
       ├── notion/SKILL.md     # Notion skill
       └── github/SKILL.md     # GitHub skill

 Dashboard:
   /home/diamondnode/dashboard.py     # Status dashboard
   /home/diamondnode/ECOSYSTEM_SUMMARY.md  # This file
```

### B. Ports and URLs

| Service | Port/URL | Protocol | Status |
|---------|----------|----------|--------|
| Diamond Gateway | http://localhost:8000 | HTTP | ✅ Running |
| gc-mcp (iholt) | https://gc-mcp.iholt.workers.dev | HTTPS | ✅ Running |
| gc-mcp (oi) | https://api.optimizationinversion.com/mcp | HTTPS | ⚠️ Needs DNS |
| gc-mcp (gc) | https://gc-api.genesisconductor.io/mcp | HTTPS | ⚠️ Needs DNS |
| Notion Bridge | https://notion-bridge.iholt.workers.dev | HTTPS | ✅ Deployed |

### C. Important IDs

| Resource | ID | Purpose |
|----------|----|---------|
| Notion DB | 21e416066ef1411084d1bbaf67af79d1 | Soul-capsule database |
| Cloudflare Account | 04c59c95ce8d0a0be98099b7f7e39d18 | Worker account |

### D. Key Commands

```bash
# Restart all services
sudo systemctl restart diamond-gateway

# Check all service status
systemctl status diamond-gateway
ps aux | grep -E "(gateway|daemon)" | grep -v grep

# Deploy Cloudflare Workers
cd ~/genesis/notion-bridge && npx wrangler deploy
cd ~/gc-workers/gc-mcp && npx wrangler deploy

# Test the full flow
GATEWAY_SECRET=$(cat /etc/default/diamond-gateway | grep GATEWAY_SECRET | cut -d= -f2)
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/orchestrate \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GATEWAY_SECRET" \
  -d '{"session_id":"test","context_buffer":"test","mock_vram_used":9200,"mock_vram_total":10000}'

# Run dashboard
python3 /home/diamondnode/dashboard.py
```
